creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have fixed a FreeBSD port that I have made before.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/PORTS/Nakai/gifmerge.tgz

GIFmerge is a good and portable tool for making GIF animation.
Please take a look.

				Yukihiro Nakai
				<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
